candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest component only, not the full reported interest expense line.

variables.notes: Using priority list: explicit 'Interest Expense' first, then broader 'Financial expenses' as fallback for periods where only aggregate finance cost is reported.

candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders in parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-shareholder equity line, which avoids double counting with separately reported non-controlling interests.
